_meta.description: Ability database for SWTOR Combat Parser training tool. Fill in base_damage, cooldowns, and role for each ability.

instructions.type: damage | heal | buff | debuff | taunt | interrupt | cooldown
instructions.gcd: true if ability shares the global cooldown (~1.5s), false for off-GCD abilities
instructions.cooldown_sec: additional cooldown beyond GCD. 0 means GCD-only
instructions.base_damage_min/max: tooltip damage range (pre-mitigation). Leave 0 if unknown
instructions.dot_ticks: number of ticks if this is a DoT or HoT effect. 0 = direct
